home_description_plain: I enjoy adding value to people by building robust, reliable, and high-impact systems.
experience_0_description: Backend & Cloud Developer at a startup focused on supporting insurance intermediaries. Designed scalable AWS infrastructure using EC2 behind Application Load Balancers, combined with serverless solutions (Lambda, API Gateway). Led the development of external sales integrations—including the SOAT insurance form—with bidirectional communication to the corporate ERP (Odoo 18) via Python APIs. Built dynamic interfaces with React and Vite, backed by Node.js and Express. Managed relational and non-relational databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB). Maintained CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Docker.
experience_1_description: Collaborated with a research group on emerging technologies, contributing to algorithm development and methodology structuring in the field of Quantum Computing. Authored and formatted scientific documents with high mathematical complexity using LaTeX.
projects_0_description: A web application that allows users to search for GIFs using the Giphy API.
